summary: Inventory management app with upload/download Excel (.xlsx) support on the inventory page, compatible with all Excel versions regardless of column separator (; or ,).
architectural_notes: Excel import/export must use .xlsx format (not CSV), compatible with all Excel versions and both ; and , column separators

existing_features.title: Add an Excel export (download) button to the Inventory page that exports all inventory items to a well-formatted .xlsx file. The exported file must include columns: Name, Type (Goods/Service), Purchase Price, Selling Price, Stock, and Unit. The file must be compatible with all Excel versions and must NOT use CSV format.

Add an Excel import (upload) button to the Inventory page that allows users to upload a .xlsx file to bulk-import inventory items. The import logic must correctly parse both semicolon (;) and comma (,) column separators to ensure compatibility across all regional Excel versions. After a successful import, the inventory list must refresh to show the newly imported items.

Create a downloadable Excel template file that users can download before importing, pre-filled with the correct column headers (Name, Type, Purchase Price, Selling Price, Stock, Unit) and one example row. This helps users prepare their data in the correct format.

new_feature_requests.summary: Tambahkan menu unggah (import) dan unduh (export) file Excel (.xlsx) di halaman Inventory, rapi dan kompatibel dengan semua versi Excel baik yang menggunakan pemisah kolom ; maupun ,
